options.content:
# Federation Operations Status

Integrated operational synchronization across urban operation, fleet operation, service hub, energy, and dispatch execution.

Visible states:
- AUTHORIZED
- HOLD
- STOP

This dashboard intentionally excludes internal propagation logic and business control equations.

| Layer | Visible State |
|---|---|
| Urban Operation | synchronized |
| Fleet Operation | synchronized |
| Service Hub | synchronized |
| Dispatch | feasible |
| Energy | stable |
| ODD | within operating range |
| ETA | within threshold |
| Capacity | within threshold |
| Queue | controlled |
